item.title: GOPO Toys Recalls Pull String Teething Toys Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking; Violate Mandatory Standard for Toys
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from August 2023 through March 2026 for between $11 to $15.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from August 2023 through March 2026 for between $11 to $15.
item.product: GOPO TOYS Pull String Teething Toys
item.summary: This recall involves GOPO TOYS pull string teething toys. The teething toys consist of an off-white disc shape with a gray ball in the center and six multi-colored, silicone tentacle-looking pull strings that run through the ball. The disc has seven soft push buttons. The brand name and "Pull String Toy" is printed on the front of the product packaging, and the batch number 250905, 250530, 250120, 240315, 231005 or 230610 on the back of packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: GOPO TOYS Pull String Teething Toys.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the teething toy immediately, take it away from children and contact GOPO Toys to receive a full refund. Consumers will be asked to destroy the toy by cutting all silicone strings and writing in permanent marker "DESTROYED" on the main body of the toy and send a photo of the destroyed toy to recalls@gopotoys.com. Consumers should then dispose of the destroyed product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
